The question is asking for the population of Banat Bulgarians living in Romania in the year 1940. However, the provided data only includes population figures for years ranging from 1864 to the second half of the 19th century (before 1900). Explanation: In the given table, row 9 corresponds to the year 1940 and specifies that the population of Banat Bulgarians in the Romanian Banat only was 12,000. Therefore, the number of Banat Bulgarians living in Romania in 1940 was 12,000.
